scripts.deploy:sentry: export SENTRY_RELEASE=${SENTRY_RELEASE:-$(git rev-parse HEAD)} && wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir /tmp/stock-analyticsv2-worker-wrangler-dryrun && pnpm sentry:sourcemaps && wrangler deploy /tmp/stock-analyticsv2-worker-wrangler-dryrun/index.js --config wrangler.toml --no-bundle --upload-source-maps --keep-vars --var SENTRY_RELEASE:$SENTRY_RELEASE
scripts.sentry:sourcemaps: SENTRY_ORG=${SENTRY_ORG:-zhenheai}; SENTRY_PROJECT=${SENTRY_PROJECT:-stock-analyticsv2-worker}; sentry-cli sourcemaps inject /tmp/stock-analyticsv2-worker-wrangler-dryrun && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload /tmp/stock-analyticsv2-worker-wrangler-dryrun --org "$SENTRY_ORG" --project "$SENTRY_PROJECT" --release "$SENTRY_RELEASE"
